code:
sequenceDiagram participant C as Customer participant W as Web Frontend participant A as API Server participant D as Database participant S as Staff participant F as File Storage Note over C,F: Manual Payment Flow %% Start Payment C->>W: Click "Pay Now" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/start Note right of W: {Security_ZeroTrust} A->>D: Create Payment record Note right of A: status: PENDING D-->>A: Payment created A-->>W: {Security_Firewall} W-->>C: Show payment instructions %% Upload Proof C->>W: Upload payment proof W->>A: POST /payments/manual/proof Note right of W: multipart/form-data
{Security_IntrusionDetection} A->>F: Store proof file Note right of A: Validate file type, size F-->>A: File stored A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: UNDER_REVIEW
proofUrl: file_path D-->>A: Payment updated A-->>W: {Security_ZeroTrust} W-->>C: "Payment under review" %% Staff Review S->>W: Login to admin panel W->>A: GET /admin/payments/pending A->>D: Query pending payments D-->>A: Pending payments A-->>W: List of pending payments W-->>S: Show payment details & proof alt Payment Approved S->>W: Click "Approve" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/review Note right of W: {Security_OAuth2} A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: SUCCEEDED
reviewedAt: now(Security_OAuth2) D-->>A: Payment updated A->>D: Update Order Note right of A: status: PAID
paidAt: now(Security_ZeroTrust) D-->>A: Order updated A->>D: Create Delivery Note right of A: Generate token hash
status: PENDING D-->>A: Delivery created A-->>W: {Security_ZeroTrust} W-->>S: "Payment approved" %% Notify Customer A->>D: Create Notification Note right of A: type: PAYMENT_APPROVED D-->>A: Notification created A-->>C: SSE: payment.status else Payment Rejected S->>W: Click "Reject" W->>A: POST /payments/manual/review Note right of W: {Security_OAuth2} A->>D: Update Payment Note right of A: status: FAILED
reviewedAt: now(Security_ZeroTrust) D-->>A: Payment updated A->>D: Update Order Note right of A: status: CANCELED
canceledAt: now(Security_Firewall) D-->>A: Order updated A-->>W: {Security_Encryption} W-->>S: "Payment rejected" %% Notify Customer A->>D: Create Notification Note right of A: type: PAYMENT_REJECTED D-->>A: Notification created A-->>C: SSE: payment.status end %% Customer Response C->>W: Check payment status W->>A: GET /orders/{Security_IntrusionDetection} A->>D: Query order with payment D-->>A: Order data A-->>W: Order details W-->>C: Show updated status alt Payment Approved C->>W: Access delivery W->>A: POST /deliveries/reveal Note right of W: {Security_OAuth2} A->>D: Verify token & update delivery Note right of A: revealsLeft: 0
revealedAt: now(Security_ZeroTrust) D-->>A: Delivery updated A-->>W: {Security_Encryption} W-->>C: Show delivery content end
repo_description: KMB monorepo (web + api) with Next.js, NestJS, Prisma, Turborepo, full security hardening and CI/CD

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个手动付款流程的时序图。核心场景是：顾客先在前端发起支付，上传付款凭证，然后后台员工审核，最后顾客才能看到结果。参与者我想好了：Customer、Web Frontend、API Server、Database、Staff，还有一个File Storage专门存凭证图片。
明白了，六个参与者。我注意到安全方面涉及比较多，比如凭证上传和审核环节。这些安全策略需要显式标注在图上吗，比如ZeroTrust、OAuth2这些？
对，安全策略要标。顾客点击"立即支付"和后续交互都要走ZeroTrust，员工审核操作必须用OAuth2认证。另外上传凭证那里要加上入侵检测，查询订单状态也要检测。
好的，我先画出第一阶段：顾客点击支付，前端POST到API Server创建待支付记录，数据库返回后前端展示付款指引。这里我在Web Frontend右侧标注了{Security_ZeroTrust}。
接下来是上传凭证环节。顾客把转账截图传到前端，前端用multipart/form-data POST到API，这里要标入侵检测。然后API把文件存到File Storage，更新支付状态为"审核中"。
上传流程画好了。我注意到File Storage返回后，API更新数据库时我加了proofUrl字段存储文件路径。然后给顾客返回"Payment under review"，这里也带了ZeroTrust。
现在进入员工审核分支。Staff先登录管理后台，查询待审核列表，看到支付详情和凭证图片。然后分两种情况：批准或拒绝。批准的话，支付状态变SUCCEEDED，订单变PAID，还要创建Delivery生成取货令牌。
批准分支我画好了：员工点击批准后，POST到review接口，数据库更新支付和订单状态，创建Delivery。这里我注意到reviewedAt和paidAt都要带时间戳，安全策略方面审核操作是OAuth2，但后面更新订单我用了ZeroTrust，这样对吗？
reviewedAt那里也应该是OAuth2，因为是审核人操作的记录。另外批准后要通知顾客，用SSE推payment.status状态变更，这个别漏了。
已修正，reviewedAt现在标注OAuth2。SSE通知也加上了。我同时把拒绝分支也画好了：点击拒绝后支付变FAILED，订单变CANCELED，同样发SSE通知。拒绝分支里canceledAt我标了Security_Firewall，W到S的返回标了Encryption。
最后是顾客查询结果的分支。顾客主动刷新查看状态，前端GET订单详情，这里要标入侵检测。如果支付已批准，顾客可以"Access delivery"，POST到deliveries/reveal验证令牌并展示内容。
取货流程我画了一个嵌套的alt：只有支付批准的情况才能进入。顾客点击后，API验证token，更新delivery的revealsLeft为0，记录revealedAt。这里revealedAt我标了ZeroTrust，API返回前端用了Encryption。这样整个流程就闭环了？
对，完整闭环了。确认一下整体结构：六个参与者，三个主要阶段（发起支付-上传凭证、员工审核、顾客查询取货），两个大分支（批准/拒绝），安全策略分布合理。可以定稿了。
